# AgentAnycast Proto

> Protobuf/gRPC interface definitions and A2A data models for AgentAnycast — the single source of truth for all inter-component communication. Used by the Go daemon, relay, Python SDK, and TypeScript SDK.

## Documentation

- [Protocol Reference](https://github.com/AgentAnycast/agentanycast/blob/main/docs/protocol.md): Wire format, task lifecycle, 16 gRPC RPCs
- [Architecture](https://github.com/AgentAnycast/agentanycast/blob/main/docs/architecture.md): How proto definitions flow to downstream repos

## Build

```bash
buf lint                                    # Lint proto files
buf breaking --against '.git#branch=main'   # Check backward compatibility
buf generate                                # Generate Go + Python + TypeScript stubs
```

## Proto Files

All proto files live in `agentanycast/v1/` under package `agentanycast.v1`.

### common.proto
Shared types: `PeerInfo`, `NodeInfo`, `ConnectionType`, `NATType`.

### a2a_models.proto
A2A data model: `Task`, `Message`, `Part` (text/data/file), `Artifact`, `TaskStatus`. `A2AEnvelope` with 11 envelope types for task lifecycle (create, update, complete, fail, cancel, etc.) including streaming support.

### agent_card.proto
`AgentCard` (A2A standard + P2P extension with `did_key`), `Skill` with input/output JSON schemas.

### node_service.proto
SDK-to-daemon gRPC interface: 16 RPCs covering node management, peer management, task client/server operations, streaming, and discovery.

### streaming.proto
Chunked artifact delivery: `StreamStart`, `StreamChunk`, `StreamEnd`.

### registry_service.proto
Relay skill registry: `RegisterSkills`, `UnregisterSkills`, `DiscoverBySkill`, `Heartbeat`.

## Code Generation

Configured in `buf.gen.yaml`:
- **Go**: `protoc-gen-go` + `protoc-gen-go-grpc` -> `gen/go/`
- **Python**: `protoc-gen-python` + `protoc-gen-grpc-python` -> `gen/python/`
- **TypeScript**: `ts-proto` with `grpc-js` output -> `gen/ts/`

Generated output directories are gitignored. Downstream repos vendor the generated stubs.

## Key Concepts

- **Buf v2**: Lint (STANDARD rules) and breaking change detection (FILE level)
- **Additive-only changes**: Never remove or rename fields; only add new fields/messages
- **Package**: `agentanycast.v1` — all files share one package
- **Dependency flow**: proto -> node/relay (Go import with local replace), proto -> python/ts (generated stubs committed in each SDK)

## Related Repositories

- [agentanycast](https://github.com/AgentAnycast/agentanycast): Documentation hub
- [agentanycast-node](https://github.com/AgentAnycast/agentanycast-node): Go daemon (imports Go stubs)
- [agentanycast-relay](https://github.com/AgentAnycast/agentanycast-relay): Relay server (imports Go stubs)
- [agentanycast-python](https://github.com/AgentAnycast/agentanycast-python): Python SDK (vendors Python stubs)
- [agentanycast-ts](https://github.com/AgentAnycast/agentanycast-ts): TypeScript SDK (vendors TS stubs)
